name: Localization
description: Returns the current position of the tourist.
postconditions: The system receives the position of the tourist.
The position of the tourist is not detectable by GPS.

UC56: The system requires the data for the position.
The GPS calculates the position of the tourist.
The system is on hold until the data of the position.

quality_requirements: The GPS requirements into the transaction in more than 5 seconds.
